case_title: MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. VS. JAMES P. COPPOLA et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. AS TO RESPONDENT COPPOLA, JAMES P. DOES 1-5, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK, N.A. HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. APPEARANCES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING -- GRANT - NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/REQ). HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $1,440.20 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE NOV-17-2005, FILED BY PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MBNA AMERICA BANK,N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT COPPOLA, JAMES P. $5,071.87 PRINCIPAL, $1,250.60 INTEREST, $189.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,512.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
